cosycritters.title: Cosy Critters Config
cosycritters.reactionDistance.descriptio: The distance under which birds will fly away from entities getting too close
cosycritters.reactionSpeed.description: The delay of a bird deciding to fly away from an entity getting too close
cosycritters.separationDistance.descript: Birds this close together will fly away from each other
cosycritters.separation.description: How fast birds will fly away from each other
cosycritters.flockRange.description: How close birds have to be to form a flock
cosycritters.alignment.description: How much birds will align with the velocity of other birds
cosycritters.cohesion.description: How much birds move towards the rest of the flock
cosycritters.landingResponsiveness.descr: How fast birds turn towards their landing spot
cosycritters.suggest: Enter a world to see suggestions
